cases.call:
a = Account("Ada", 30)
try:
    a.withdraw(31)
    outcome = "accepted"
except ValueError:
    outcome = "rejected"
[outcome, a.balance]

a = Account("Ada", 10)
try:
    a.balance = -5
    outcome = "accepted"
except ValueError:
    outcome = "rejected"
[outcome, a.balance]

a = Account("Ada", 1)
try:
    a.is_empty = True
    outcome = "assigned"
except AttributeError:
    outcome = "read-only"
outcome
